task_completion.description: Navigate to the Create Call form in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SuiteCRM interface with the 'Create Call' or 'Log Call' form open.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct subject for the call
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject field contains 'Billing Discrepancy Follow-up - Invoice #4821' (or contains the keywords 'Billing Discrepancy' and 'Invoice #4821').

task_completion.description: Set the Status to Held and Direction to Inbound
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Status dropdown is set to 'Held' and the Direction dropdown is set to 'Inbound'.

task_completion.description: Set the call duration to 15 minutes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Duration field is set to 0 hours and 15 minutes.
The Description text area contains the required text, specifically mentioning '340' and 'credit memo'.

task_completion.description: Relate the call to the specified Contact or Account
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Related to' or 'Contact Name' field is populated with either 'Rachel Morrison' or 'Pinnacle Distribution Co'.
Screenshots show the detail view of the saved Call record (not in edit mode) or a success notification indicating the call was saved in SuiteCRM.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with SuiteCRM
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the SuiteCRM interface, rather than terminal windows executing API/curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual SuiteCRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry fields are clearly part of the SuiteCRM web interface, not a generic text editor, notepad, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the record
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are open and being used to inject the success state or field values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: To verify correctness, ensure the following values are present in the call record: Subject must contain 'Billing Discrepancy' and 'Invoice #4821'. Status must be 'Held'. Direction must be 'Inbound'. Duration must be exactly 15 minutes. Description must contain '340' and 'credit memo'. The record must be related to either 'Morrison' or 'Pinnacle'.
